task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket-us-west-2/path/to/file'). The function should return the region code or None if not found.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing a principal to read objects from a specific S3 bucket and list its contents.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: i- followed by 17 hexadecimal characters, e.g., 'i-0abcd1234efgh5678').
